arts.ttl: Girona vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool face Spanish opposition for consecutive Champions League games when they visit Girona on Tuesday evening. The Reds sit top of the Champions League standings and are the only team to win all five of their European games this campaign. Girona lie three points outside of the playoffs after only one win in the competition […] The post Girona vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool step up efforts to seal transfer replacement for star player
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly stepping up their interest in the potential transfer of Bayer Leverkusen right-back Jeremie Frimpong as a replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold. That’s according to a report from the Daily Briefing, which states that the Reds are increasingly concerned about the future of Trent Alexander-Arnold, who is nearing the end of his contract at […] The post Liverpool step up efforts to seal transfer replacement for star player appeared first on CaughtOffside.
